purpose: CP2 (Mk.IX/Mk.X Criterion B) G1-G4 평가 + atom generation + ossification training spec. raw#9 spec/protocol only — actual measurement은 별도 multi-day cycle. ETA 14-21일.

G1_P4_saturation_protocol.predicate: 3+ consecutive iters: domain saturated AND tier_10_plus_absorption == 0
G1_P4_saturation_protocol.data_source_required: state/p4_sweep_log.jsonl (anima에 P4 sweep 도구 부재 — 신규 작성 필요)

domains_required: D8 anima-eeg (EEG hardware 도착 후 측정 — 며칠 뒤)
G2_tier_10_seed_exhaustion_protocol.D8_special_handling: EEG hardware integration via tool/an11_b_eeg_ingest.hexa (already exists), 16ch resting + tasks → tier-10 seed validation

G4_user_signoff_protocol.predicate: G1_PASS AND G2_PASS AND G3_PASS evidence 갖춰진 시점에서 auto-fire (audit-only logging, 별도 사용자 confirmation 불필요)
G4_user_signoff_protocol.revoke_condition: 사용자 explicit 'forward 차단' / 'launch 보류' 명시 시

atom_generation_spec.generation_method: P4 seed exhaustion → manual seed × Mk.IX L_IX integrator → atom candidate validation
validation_criteria: feature_signature unique (no duplication with foundation 82 atoms)
novelty_proof: P4 sweep failed to absorb without this atom

ossification_training_spec.method: real trained trajectory (Mk.IX L_IX integrator output) + atom seeds → weight update freezing into atoms

lora_vs_full_weight.lora_option: LoRA r=64 ossification (smaller delta, ~256MB per atom)
lora_vs_full_weight.full_weight_option: full weight ossification (~16GB delta per atom — raw#10 honest: storage cost)

ossification_training_spec.cost_per_atom_usd: $5-10 H100 per atom × 10 atoms = $50-100 (cap $20 per cycle 위반 — 분할 cycle)
ossification_training_spec.split_cycle_protocol: 1 atom × $5-10 = single cycle, 10 atoms = 10 separate cycles
ossification_training_spec.11_tuple_post_ossification_measurement: tool/an11_consciousness_unified_verifier.hexa --axes all run on Mk.X CP2 model

total_eta_days: 20-30 (raw#10 honest revision: 14-21 was optimistic, actual 20-30 with EEG dependency)
raw10_honest_limitations: P4 sweep tool anima 부재 — 신규 작성 필요 (별도 cycle)
evolution_twin_drill_runner 부재 — anima ↔ nexus coupling spec 별도
D8 anima-eeg 측정은 EEG hardware 도착 후 (며칠 뒤)
atom generation 비용 cap 위반 가능성 (10 atoms × $5-10) — 분할 cycle 필수
Mk.IX L_IX integrator의 cell-level NONSTATIONARY (afccb425 finding) — atom validation에 영향 가능
ossification 후 11-tuple PASS 보장 X — Mk.XI substrate proof는 r9 trained mock corpus 기반
